title: glechoma hederacea var. montana
intro: Glechoma hederacea var. montana, also known as wood mint or mountain germander, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family, characterized by its small, oval-shaped leaves and pink or purple flowers. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being. The health benefits of Glechoma hederacea var. montana include reducing symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improving cognitive function, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to calm the digestive system and promote relaxation.
